svg.text: 02 技术演进

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 四大技术趋势深度解析

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 模型效率优化

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 从参数竞赛到效率竞赛

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 参数规模增长放缓，7B-70B成为主流

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 量化压缩技术成熟，INT4/INT8推理普及

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • MoE架构提升效率，稀疏激活降低算力

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 同等效果下推理成本降低90%

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif
Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 多模态原生

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 统一架构处理全模态数据

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 文本、图像、音频、视频统一编码

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 跨模态理解：看图说话、听音识图

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 多模态生成：文生图、图生视频

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 成为大模型标配能力

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: Agent生态

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: 工具调用与任务编排标准化

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • Function Calling成为标准接口

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 多Agent协作框架涌现（AutoGPT等）

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: • 记忆、规划、执行能力持续增强

text.font-family: Geist Sans, Inter, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif

svg.text: → 从"会说"到"会做"的跨越

svg.text: 行业专用模型快速涌现

svg.text: • 法律、医疗、金融等垂直模型成熟
